person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
The Life Summary of Robert
When Sir Robert Cameron 8th. Clan Chief of Ballegarno was born in 1255, in Ballegarno, Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron, was 25 and his mother, Roberta Cameron, was 16. He married Mary Campbell about 1280, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1296, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 41, and was buried in Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Cameron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: in the Highlands, it is usually a nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + sròn ‘nose’.
in the Lowlands it is also a habitational name from any of various places called Cameron, especially in Fife.

variants.name: Cambron
meanings: Spanish (Cambrón): habitational name from any of several places in the provinces of Cáceres and Murcia called Cambrón.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Somme and Aisne called Cambron. Alternatively, from a diminutive of c(h)ambre ‘room’ (see Cambre ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Roberta Cameron(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 Mary Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1296년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 드 스콘에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert V Cameron 8th Chief of Clan Cameron родился около 1255 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Cameron 7th. Chief of Clan Cameron было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Roberta Cameron, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Campbell около 1280 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1296 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
